Fable-5 entering W24

span.p:
true log floor 2026-05-13 (~34 days)
NO pre-2026 / 8-month data exists anywhere

div.style: color: rgb(51, 66, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
subagents write SEPARATE transcripts →
top-level sessions undercount real work by ~32%

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
I:O ratio 239:1 machine-wide
(median session 382:1)
vs the cluster's cited 53:1 → tool-call time ≈ context-ingestion time

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
~94% of ingested context is CACHE-READ
(intra-session prompt-cache reuse) →
the KV-reuse win is largely already harvested

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
What the session transcripts actually say
(EXACT token counts from message.usage records — the only place they live)
